children.name: Product defects

 +  where {1007757} = <built-in method intersection of set object at 0x7fb6f8820740>({862, 83533, 301528, 454639, 687163, 976912, ...})
 +    where <built-in method intersection of set object at 0x7fb6f8820740> = {11012, 28322, 931285, 936075, 1007757, 1057265, ...}.intersection

 +  where False = is_search_keyword_required_popup_displayed()
